┏━✦ ALISHA BLAIR grew up in a privileged household. Throughout her childhood, everything she wanted was handed to her on a silver plate, thus making her quite incompetent in life. Her parents, realizing their mistake, tried to correct it by forcing a job on her to which Alisha refused. After many different attempts, they grew tired and disappointed and finally gave up by disowning and kicking her out of the house. 

During one of her nights out with her girls, she met you, someone who seems to be a lot older than her… and someone who looks to be very financially well off.✦━━┛
